question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately presented the full solution with explanation, never engaging the user at any decision point. The two-option choice paradigm specified in the project's CLAUDE.md was completely absent.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The Pair could have surfaced meaningful forks (naive recursion vs memoization vs iterative DP, base case handling, space optimization trade-offs) but presented everything as a fait accompli.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there are no questions. The Pair dumped the complete solution, walkthrough, and complexity analysis in one shot — the answer is fully spoiled before the user has a chance to think.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and well-formatted, but it's a one-way lecture rather than a conversation. The user's 'turn 2' is just them mechanically affirming the solution — there's no real back-and-forth or pedagogical engagement.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
